brand_identity.name: Red Rocks Carpet Cleaning & Upholstery Care

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider transition-all transform hover:scale-105 shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-6 py-3 border-2 border-white text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-[#7B2D26] transition-all

cards.service: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden hover:shadow-2xl transition-shadow duration-300 border border-slate-100
cards.testimonial: bg-slate-50 p-8 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 relative

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Run 'npm install lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge class-variance-authority @radix-ui/react-slot @radix-ui/react-dialog @radix-ui/react-label @radix-ui/react-accordion @radix-ui/react-scroll-area framer-motion'
TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to include colors: primary: '#7B2D26', secondary: '#008080', accent: '#D4AF37'. Add fontFamily: sans: ['Inter'], heading: ['Oswald'].
COMPONENTS: Create a 'QuoteForm' component using Radix UI Dialog or custom modal. It must be accessible via a sticky 'Get Quote' button.

HERO SECTION: Use the 'hero_bg' image with a dark overlay (bg-black/50). Text should be white. Headline: 'Denver's Premier Carpet & Upholstery Care'. Subhead: 'Revitalize your home with Red Rocks deep cleaning technology.'
SERVICES SECTION: Use a Bento Grid layout. Cards should have hover effects (scale up slightly). Use the provided service images.
TRUST SIGNALS: Add a '5-Star Rated' badge and a section for 'Why Choose Us' (Eco-friendly, IICRC Certified, Satisfaction Guaranteed).
MOBILE: Ensure the 'Call Now' button is sticky at the bottom on mobile screens.
ANTI-AI RULES: Do NOT use generic 'blue' for everything. Use the brand Maroon and Teal. Do NOT center all text. Use left alignment for body copy. Add noise texture to the dark footer background.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters where appropriate.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
